sample_question: In what year was the creator of The Two Fridas born?
sample_context: Frida Kahlo was born in Coyoacan, Mexico in 1907. Frida Kahlo created The Two Fridas in 1939. Meanwhile, Ada Lovelace was working on similar topics in England.

- It is also stated that Frida Kahlo was born in Coyoacan, Mexico in 1907.
- Therefore, the creator of "The Two Fridas," Frida Kahlo, was born in 1907.
